event: Landscape with ruined castle and distant church
symbols: ruined castle walls — the transience of earthly power, the vanity of human fortification against time
distant church spire — the endurance of faith amid temporal decay, the church as a fixed point on the horizon
towering storm clouds with light breaking through — divine sovereignty over nature, the interplay of judgment and mercy
still water reflecting the sky — the calm that persists beneath turbulent heavens
description: A wide panoramic landscape under a vast, dramatic sky dominated by towering cumulus clouds in dark grays and warm whites, with patches of golden light breaking through at the upper right. The flat green terrain stretches to a distant horizon where a single church spire rises among low trees and buildings. In the foreground, crumbling stone walls of a ruined castle or fortification sit at the lower right, partially overgrown with vegetation. A small still pond or stream reflects the sky near the ruins. Scattered trees and low scrubland fill the middle ground.

_meta.title: Landscape with Ruined Castle and Church
